mapper.sql: select id, order_code, supplier_code, supplier_name, order_date, expected_date, status, total_quantity, total_amount, currency, bill_type, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from purchase_order
mapper.select:
and order_code like concat('%', #{orderCode}, '%')
and supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_order(order_code, supplier_code, supplier_name, order_date, expected_date, status, total_quantity, total_amount, currency, bill_type, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{orderCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{orderDate}, #{expectedDate}, #{status}, #{totalQuantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{currency}, #{billType}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update purchase_order set order_code = #{orderCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, order_date = #{orderDate}, expected_date = #{expectedDate}, status = #{status}, total_quantity = #{totalQuantity}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, currency = #{currency}, bill_type = #{billType}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from purchase_order where id in
#{id}

delete from purchase_order_line where order_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from purchase_order_line where order_id = #{orderId} order by line_no
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_order_line(order_id, line_no, material_id, material_code, material_name, spec, model, unit, order_quantity, received_quantity, qualified_quantity, inbound_quantity, unit_price, tax_rate, amount, planned_date, quote_id, quote_line_id, price_source, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{lineNo}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{spec}, #{model}, #{unit}, #{orderQuantity}, #{receivedQuantity}, #{qualifiedQuantity}, #{inboundQuantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{taxRate}, #{amount}, #{plannedDate}, #{quoteId}, #{quoteLineId}, #{priceSource}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update purchase_order_line set material_id = #{materialId}, material_code = #{materialCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, order_quantity = #{orderQuantity}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, tax_rate = #{taxRate}, amount = #{amount}, planned_date = #{plannedDate}, quote_id = #{quoteId}, quote_line_id = #{quoteLineId}, price_source = #{priceSource}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from purchase_order_line where id in
#{id}
